batch_summary: Deed [308] (FC File No. 2460, Deed Record 262, Pg. 227–234) — Personal property conveyance from all J.V. Bounds Jr. will beneficiaries to his widow Bessie Bounds (1955). Explicitly reserves real estate remainder interests. No title chain impact, but rich genealogical source: identifies Spencer Bounds as previously unknown T.A. Bounds child; corrects Willis H. Bounds 'died in infancy' error (alive and notarized 7/30/1955); documents children of five deceased T.A. Bounds children (John T., Allen, Spencer, Laura McLelland, George P.); confirms Clyde Bounds (ISSUE-43 item 22) as Allen Bounds' son. Updates ISSUE-44 and ISSUE-43 references from '1955-2460' to 'deed [308]'. PDF confirmed.

operations.content:
│                  NOTE: **Spencer Bounds** (deceased bef. 1955; children: Mary Bounds (feme sole), Gail Bounds) identified as T.A. Bounds child
     │                  and brother of J.V. Jr. per deed [308]. Mother unknown (Margaret Jane or Rhoda Virginia). Distinct from JH Bounds child
     │                  "John Spencer Bounds" (different generation). Elijah S. Bounds (first marriage, 1885) absent from deed [308] — likely
     │                  predeceased J.V. Jr. without surviving children who were will beneficiaries.

03_DEED_CHAIN_SUMMARY.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [308] added to Phase 1 — Conveyance of personal property, Willis Bounds et al. (J.V. Bounds Jr. will beneficiaries) to Mrs. Bessie Bounds (1955); personal property only, real estate reserved

operations.description: Add deed [308] entry to Phase 1, after deed [02] (last current Phase 1 entry)
operations.anchor: 16. `1946-02-13_[02]_f` — MS Bounds → HD Vickers (warranty, **surface only**, Freestone)
operations.content: 17. `1955-07-20_[308]_f` — Willis Bounds et al. → Mrs. Bessie Bounds (conveyance, **personal property only**, Freestone) — All surviving brothers and sisters of J.V. Bounds Jr. (deceased) and children of deceased siblings, as beneficiaries under J.V. Jr.'s will (executed 6/18/1923), convey all personal property interests to Bessie Bounds (widow). Explicitly reserves real estate: "THIS gift does not include and is without prejudice to our rights of remainder in the real estate vested in us under the terms of said will." Consideration: $1.00 + compassionate recital. 31 signatories including M. Sylvanus Bounds (= MS Bounds). Identifies Spencer Bounds (deceased) as additional T.A. Bounds child not previously documented. Confirms Willis H. Bounds alive ("died in infancy" corrected). Confirms Clyde Bounds = son of Allen Bounds = Clyde L. Bounds of ISSUE-43 item 22. FC File No. 2460, Deed Record 262, Pg. 227–234. Filed 10/22/1955 at 8:00 AM; recorded 12/16/1955 at 1:15 PM; Henry McCormick, County Clerk; Deputy: Joyce Lye. [PDF CONFIRMED: deed [308], 2026-03-31]

operations.description: Update Phase 1 overview table to include [308]

06_TECHNICAL_SPEC.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [308] added to Deed Register — Conveyance of personal property, Willis Bounds et al. (J.V. Jr. will beneficiaries) to Mrs. Bessie Bounds (FC File No. 2460, DR 262/227)

operations.description: Add deed [308] to Deed Register table, before the 'Add rows' marker
operations.anchor: *Add rows as additional PDFs are reviewed.*
operations.content: | [308] | Willis Bounds et al. (J.V. Bounds Jr. will beneficiaries) → Mrs. Bessie Bounds | Freestone | ✓ | File No. 2460; Deed Record 262, Pg. 227–234, Freestone County. Filed Oct 22, 1955 at 8:00 AM; recorded Dec 16, 1955 at 1:15 PM; Henry McCormick, County Clerk, Freestone County; Deputy: Joyce Lye. | 227–234 (8 pages) | 1955-07-20 | 1955-12-16 | **Conveyance — Personal Property Only.** All surviving brothers and sisters of J.V. Bounds Jr. (deceased) and children of deceased siblings, as beneficiaries under his will (executed 6/18/1923), convey all personal property interests to Mrs. Bessie Bounds (widow). Explicitly reserves real estate: "THIS gift does not include and is without prejudice to our rights of remainder in the real estate vested in us under the terms of said will." Consideration: $1.00 + compassionate recital. 31 signatories. Surviving siblings: Willis, M. Sylvanus (= MS Bounds), Rufus, Oscar, B. Frank, W.E., Ebb, Oliver, Margaret Bounds Mean(s) (widow), Martha Bounds Eckhardt (+ W.F. Eckhardt). Deceased siblings with children: John T. (Kenneth, Charles, Janet m. Carter, Annie Laura m. Stanfield, Emma m. Stoddard); Allen (Clyde, Maurine m. Henderson); Spencer (Mary, Gail); Laura McLelland (Granville E., Elgin, Rufus); George P. (T.A., Oscar Edward, Laura Belle m. Threet). Acknowledgments span Jul–Oct 1955 across Freestone, Anderson, Dallas, Harris, Nueces, and Jefferson Counties. Key findings: Willis H. Bounds alive ("died in infancy" corrected); Spencer Bounds newly identified T.A. Bounds child (distinct from JH Bounds child John Spencer Bounds); Clyde Bounds = son of Allen = Clyde L. Bounds of ISSUE-43 item 22. ISSUE-44 advanced. Phase 1 |
